creator: ports@bsdserwis.com
text:
Created attachment 203162
drupal7.63-7.65.patch

There were published new version of drupal core. drupal7 is still 7.63 (ports tree) while there new version 7.65.

I've made a patch which updates www/drupal7. I've tested it with poudriere: http://pkg.bsdserwis.com/pkg/data/11x64-testing-php72/2019-03-26_15h36m03s/logs/drupal7-7.65.log

I hope it will be updated soon (AFAIK this updates covers security issues).
